brand.name: Sparkd
brand.vibe: Premium, minimal, fashion editorial, high-trust, tactile

headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Editorial Grids, Asymmetry. Focus on negative space to establish premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system_marketing: Bento 'Tetris' Grid, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12), mixing spans for asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.swipe_deck_layout: Relative container, absolute stacked cards. Cards must be max-h-[80vh] with fluid width. Text overlay pinned to bottom.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background #181615, 1px subtle border #332D29, no shadow. Active/Hover states lift with soft ambient shadow.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.modals_and_age_gate: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#181615]/70 border border-white/10. Must feel like milled crystal.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary uses brand terracotta #C45A45. Secondary uses transparent bg with border. Small-caps tracking-wide for text.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.legal_pages: Magazine layout: Asymmetric 2-column grid on desktop. Massive H1s, deep margins, elegant pull quotes in Fraunces italic, no boring walls of text.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.pricing_table: Tracing Beam aesthetic for Premium/Platinum tiers. Active glowing border.

components.navigation: Sticky or fixed top, Glassmorphism. Brand name centered in Fraunces, minimal Phosphor icons.
components.swipe_card: Edge-to-edge image. Heavy bottom gradient overlay: bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent. Ensure text meets APCA contrast.
components.safety_center: Editorial cards, high contrast, clean iconography. Use blurred photo representations for women's safety features demo.
components.trust_badges: Minimalist outline icons, colored in safety_badge gold or success green, paired with 'Verified' uppercase tracking-widest text.

motion.swipe_gestures: Framer Motion drag constraints. Spring physics (stiffness: 300, damping: 20). Dynamic tilt rotation linked to drag X offset (x input maps to rotateZ).
motion.page_transitions: Subtle fade and y-axis drift (slide up 10px).
motion.micro_interactions: Hover scale 1.02 on interactive cards, tap scale 0.98 on buttons. High refresh-rate fluidity.

icons.style: Duotone or Thin weight. Sophisticated, un-cluttered.

image_urls.description: Fashion editorial portrait of diverse young women, useful for premium marketing hero or app showcase.
High quality portrait for dating app match cards placeholder.
Diverse group portrait, excellent for Community Guidelines or Safety Center headers.
Abstract minimalist padlock, suitable for Trust & Safety, Privacy Policy, or Age Gate backgrounds.

testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, swipe cards, modals) MUST include descriptive, kebab-case data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: READ THE COLORS: Implement the dark theme explicitly. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors like slate/blue. Use the provided earthy/obsidian HEX codes.
FONTS ARE CRITICAL: Import Fraunces and Manrope. Never use Inter, Space Grotesk, Roboto, or standard Sans for headings. Map Fraunces to your H1, H2, H3.

BUILDING SWIPE DECK: Use Framer Motion for draggable cards with physics. Map the drag X value to rotation to create a natural, tactile card flip effect. Cards must not be fully rectangular, use slight rounded-2xl corners.

LEGAL/COMPLIANCE PAGES: Do not treat these as boring plain text. Format them like an online fashion editorial. Use 2-column asynchronous layouts, massive section numbers, pull quotes, and generous padding.
SAFETY CENTER: Prioritize trust visuals. Implement the 'women safety tools' (blur photos, verified mode) as toggleable premium UI cards with smooth animations.
AGE GATE 18+: Display as a crystal glassmorphism modal with strict validation.
COMPLIANCE DASHBOARD: Use a dense, grid-based layout for the admin area, but keep the typography sharp and monochrome.
Ensure '10 free swipes daily' uses a circular progress or elegant timer countdown component.
USE PLACEHOLDERS PROPERLY: Only use the exact image_urls provided in this JSON. Do NOT invent 'via.placeholder.com' URLs.
